candidates.command: git commit -m checks: wire ResetProfileSnapshotCacheForTesting, delete dead ratelimit/service wrappers [ddx-97375097] Delete dead agent-package wrapper functions in ratelimit_retry.go (EvaluateRateLimitWait, IsRateLimitResult, ParseRetryAfter, ExtractRetryAfterFromStderr, RateLimitRetryConfig, ctxSleep, RunWithRateLimitRetry, BuildRateLimitRouteAttempt) — the try subpackage has its own complete rate-limit retry implementation and these wrappers are not called from any production path. Delete ratelimit_retry_test.go whose tests all covered the deleted functions. Delete ResolveServiceFromWorkDir from service_run.go — replaced by ResolveServiceFromWorkDirCtx; no production callers remained. Wire ResetProfileSnapshotCacheForTesting via init() in profile_select.go — exported for cross-package test cleanup (cmd/run_test_helpers_test.go), same init() pattern used by SetServiceRunFactory to survive deadcode RTA. Decisions log written to .ddx/executions/20260617T120241-14246f2a/decisions.md (gitignored, on-disk only per CLAUDE.md convention). Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
